title: Implement macos.communication and macos.privacy packs
description: Create internal/packs/macos/communication.go (build-tagged darwin, 2 safe, 9 destructive) for osascript Messages/Mail/System Events, Shortcuts, Automator, Finder, Terminal, JXA. All regex patterns. Create privacy.go (1 safe, 5 destructive) for keychain, iMessage DB, private data access, Spotlight. Unit tests and golden files.
